𝐏𝐨𝐬𝐭𝐝𝐨𝐜𝐭𝐨𝐫𝐚𝐥 𝐑𝐞𝐬𝐞𝐚𝐫𝐜𝐡𝐞𝐫 𝐎𝐩𝐞𝐧𝐢𝐧𝐠
We are looking for a Postdoctoral Researcher to join a funded research project at the American University of Sharjah.
The position is in the area of 𝐀𝐈, 𝐨𝐩𝐭𝐢𝐦𝐢𝐳𝐚𝐭𝐢𝐨𝐧, and 𝐬𝐦𝐚𝐫𝐭 𝐢𝐧𝐟𝐫𝐚𝐬𝐭𝐫𝐮𝐜𝐭𝐮𝐫𝐞 𝐬𝐲𝐬𝐭𝐞𝐦𝐬, with applications in resilient energy and infrastructure planning.
